title: 追忆興奮
lyrics_text:
追忆興奮
轉彎興奮的步伐
軿踏轉彎的跳躍
追忆興奮的快樂

追忆興奮
回低追忆興奮的步伐
回低跳躍的轉彎
追忆興奮的快樂
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Missing required [verse] section.", "Missing required [chorus] section.", "First non-empty line should be a section tag.", "Line 5 is a blank line not followed by a section tag.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 10."]
quality_suggestions: ["聲調：避免連續相同聲調，注意每行第二、四字的平仄交替。", "押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "詞彙：增加用詞多樣性，減少同一詞語的頻繁重複。"]
